agentDetail.modeTooltip: Managed: Paperclip stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.

agentDetail.entryFileTooltip: The main file the agent reads first when loading instructions. Defaults to AGENTS.md.

agentDetail.defaultEnvHint: Agent-level default execution target. Project and task settings can still override this.
agentDetail.noModelDetected: No model detected. Select one or enter manually.
agentDetail.companySkillsDescription: Optional skills from the company library. Paperclip built-in runtime skills are added automatically.

agentDetail.noExplicitCheapModel: No explicit cheap model selected — runtime falls back to

agentDetail.browserSecurityPathHint: Browser security prevents apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input field.
agentDetail.envVarsHelp: Set the KEY to the environment variable name the process expects, e.g. GH_TOKEN. Choose Secret to resolve a value stored in the vault at run-start. PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.

settings.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF or SVG logo image.

settings.packagesMoveNotice: Import and export have been moved to dedicated pages accessible in the header of the
settings.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
settings.enableEnvironmentsNotice: Enable Environments in experimental instance settings to manage company execution targets.
settings.environmentsDescription: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
settings.environmentsNotice: Environment options use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments only appear when a compatible sandbox provider plugin is installed.
settings.humansDescription: Manage human members and their roles.
settings.grantsDescription: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides.
settings.noRoleImplicitGrants: No role selected, so this member has no implicit grants now.

settings.instanceAdminNotice: You can manage access as an instance admin.
settings.createInviteDescription: Invite new members to join your company.
settings.viewerDescription: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
settings.operatorDescription: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
settings.adminDescription: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
settings.adminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
settings.ownerDescription: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
settings.ownerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.
settings.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this company?
settings.copyInviteManually: Invite link copied. Share it manually.

settings.noPermissionToManageInvites: You do not have permission to manage invites.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.paperclipManagedDesc: Paperclip manages creation and rotations at this provider.

secrets.noUsage: This secret is not being used by any resources.
secrets.iamMissingPermissions: Check IAM permissions for this provider vault.

secrets.noSecretsVisible: No secrets found in this vault.
secrets.noSecretsSelected: Select secrets to review them for import.
secrets.noSecretsYet: No secrets yet. Create your first managed secret or link an external reference.

howToUseDesc.title: Use secrets by binding them to runtime environment variables.
howToUseDesc.p1: Create or link a secret here, then open an agent's Environment Variables or a project's Env field.
howToUseDesc.p2: Add the env key the process expects, e.g. GH_TOKEN, choose Secret and select the stored secret version.
howToUseDesc.p3: Paperclip resolves the value on the server when the run starts and injects it as that env variable. Project env applies to all tasks in the project and overrides agent env on matching keys.

usageTab.noBindings: No active bindings. Add this secret in agent, project, environment, or plugin config to start using it.

eventsTab.noEvents: No access events recorded yet. Each runtime resolution writes a redacted entry here.

createDialog.managedValueDesc: Paperclip stores and manages the secret value.
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.storedOnce: Stored once — cannot be retrieved after creation.
createDialog.title: New Secret
createDialog.usageDescription: Bind this secret to an environment variable in agent or project config.

deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The secret will be permanently deleted.
deleteDialog.title: Delete secret?

detailsTab.noRedisplay: Secret values cannot be displayed after creation.

rotateDialog.descriptionExternal: Update the external reference for this secret.
rotateDialog.descriptionManaged: Replace the current value with a new one.

vaultDialog.awsVaultDisabled: AWS vault is disabled for this deployment.
vaultDialog.backupWarning: Warning: Ensure you have backups before proceeding.
vaultDialog.configureAwsHint: Configure AWS credentials for this vault.

general.censorLogsDesc: Hide the username segment in home directory paths and log outputs visible to the operator. Isolated mentions of the username outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. Disabled by default.
general.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable application keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. Disabled by default.
general.backupRetentionDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run approximately every hour and are gzip compressed. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
general.noDefaultSaved: No default saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and save the answer here.
general.description: Configure instance preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
general.authLocalDesc: Trusted local mode is optimized for a single local operator. Browser requests execute in the local context and no login is required.
general.authPublicDesc: Authenticated public mode requires login for dashboard access and is intended for public URLs.
general.authPrivateDesc: Authenticated private mode requires login and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private network deployments.

profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other dashboard surfaces.
profile.displayNameHint: Displayed in the sidebar footer and comment authorship surfaces.
profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
profile.clickAvatar: Click avatar to upload a new image.
profile.uploadHintSelect: Select a company to upload an avatar to Paperclip storage.
profile.selectCompanyAvatar: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.

access.title: Instance Access
access.description: Search users, manage instance admin status, and control which companies they can access.
access.companyAccessDesc: Change company membership for this user. New access is set to active operator member by default.
access.adminRequired: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
access.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with timer heartbeat enabled across all your companies.
heartbeats.disableConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
heartbeats.emptyMessage: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt-in to features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.noRecoveryTasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery may still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
experimental.enableEnvironmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow environment assignment controls for projects and agents.
experimental.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevDesc: In pnpm dev:once, wait for all queued and in-progress local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.autoCreateRecoveryDesc: Allow the heartbeat scheduler to create recovery tasks for issue dependency chains found within the configured lookback window.

adapters.title: Adapters
adapters.alphaDescription: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
adapters.noExternalDesc: Install an adapter package to extend model support.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Search issues, comments, documents, agents, projects...

initial.title: Type to search company memory.
initial.subtitle: Issues, comments, plan documents, agents, projects — same surface, ranked by relevance.
initial.identifierDesc: type PAP-123 to jump straight to an issue.
initial.quotesDesc: wrap a phrase in quotes to match the exact sequence.
initial.shortcutDesc: reopens the command palette pre-seeded with your current query.

error.title: Couldn’t run that search
error.retryHint: Your input and filters are still here, so you can retry or fall back to the Issues filter.

empty.title: No results for "{{query}}"
empty.subtitle: We couldn’t find a match in {{scope}}. Try widening the scope or rephrasing your query.
empty.tip1: Try fewer tokens or a single distinctive term.
empty.tip2: Use an identifier shortcut like PAP-123.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

routines.afterCreation: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger configuration. Draft routines remain paused until you add a default agent.

liveness.completedDesc: The issue reached a terminal state.
liveness.advancedDesc: The run produced concrete evidence of progress.
liveness.plan_onlyDesc: The run described future work without concrete action evidence.
liveness.empty_responseDesc: The run finished without useful output.
liveness.blockedDesc: The run or issue declared a blocker.
liveness.needs_followupDesc: The run produced useful output but did not prove concrete progress.
liveness.checksAfterFinishDesc: Liveness is evaluated after the run finishes.
liveness.retryPendingDesc: Paperclip has queued an automatic retry that has not started yet.
liveness.noLivenessDataDesc: This run has no persisted liveness classification.

issueChat.feedbackLocalNote: Your feedback is always stored locally regardless of sharing preference.

error.internalState: The chat renderer encountered an internal error.

costs.projectPolicyDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-linked projects.

costs.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who billed or credited them.
costs.noData: No cost data found for this period.
